extraction.one_line_summary: VIVIANI Elia won the Stage 17 sprint after Quick-Step controlled through rain, BENNETT Sam boxed in at final left turn with 750m remaining.
tactical_patterns: POELS Wout negotiated intermediate sprint bonus seconds with breakaway companions to maintain group cohesion before continuing cooperation.
Quick-Step positioned VIVIANI Elia with dual lead-out through wet final 2km while BENNETT Sam lost positioning at critical left-hand turn 750m out.
VAN POPPEL Boy launched premature sprint from distance enabling VIVIANI to time final acceleration with superior positioning against boxed BENNETT.

rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: positive: Sealed points classification with fourth stage win showing superior positioning discipline through technical wet finale.
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Isolated without lead-out train and tactically boxed at crucial left turn despite maintaining front-of-bunch presence earlier.
rider_signals.SABATINI Fabio: positive: Executed dual Quick-Step lead-out through rain-soaked finale demonstrating team's sprint train depth beyond primary lead-out man.
rider_signals.POELS Wout: neutral: Collected intermediate sprint bonuses through breakaway negotiation though 10-minute GC deficit renders time gains symbolic.
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Boy: negative: Mistimed sprint launch from excessive distance allowing positioned sprinters to draft and overwhelm late.
